pull.title: cmake: Remove GUI-specific definitions from `bitcoin-build-config.h`
pull.body:
Consider the following workflow:
```
cmake -B build -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF
cmake --build build
cmake -B build -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF -DBUILD_GUI=ON
cmake --build build
```

The last command builds not only `bitcoin-qt` and `bitcoin-gui`, but also unnecessarily rebuilds other targets.

This is caused by including GUI-specific definitions, such as `USE_DBUS` and `USE_QRCODE`, in `bitcoin-build-config.h`, which in turn triggers the recompilation for all targets that consume this header.

This PR resolves the issue. This is useful on its own, but it is also a necessary prerequisite for effectively addressing https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/issues/29914.

verification.payload:
tree 97e47b1517639623cc6cf03a14e2f5f7c2739d72
parent 7844a2f08303edb665e4292d002a826f24e62832
author Hennadii Stepanov <32963518+hebasto@users.noreply.github.com> 1776185875 +0100
committer Hennadii Stepanov <32963518+hebasto@users.noreply.github.com> 1776185875 +0100

cmake: Move `USE_DBUS` to `bitcoinqt` target

This removes the `USE_DBUS` definition from `bitcoin-build-config.h`,
reducing the dependency of non-GUI code on GUI-specific definitions.

This removes the `USE_DBUS` definition from `bitcoin-build-config.h`,
reducing the dependency of non-GUI code on GUI-specific definitions.

verification.payload:
tree 6297867cf028d73f9ea491397f7d6c22383f89e2
parent ed56b37c4a525353138fb2f43e8744d855c9eb89
author Hennadii Stepanov <32963518+hebasto@users.noreply.github.com> 1776186296 +0100
committer Hennadii Stepanov <32963518+hebasto@users.noreply.github.com> 1776186296 +0100

cmake: Move `USE_QRCODE` to `bitcoinqt` target

This removes the `USE_QRCODE` definition from `bitcoin-build-config.h`,
reducing the dependency of non-GUI code on GUI-specific definitions.

Additionally, `QRencode::QRencode` is now linked only when wallet is
enabled, because the `qrencode.h` header is used exclusively in
wallet-specific code.

events.message:
cmake: Move `USE_QRCODE` to `bitcoinqt` target

This removes the `USE_QRCODE` definition from `bitcoin-build-config.h`,
reducing the dependency of non-GUI code on GUI-specific definitions.

Additionally, `QRencode::QRencode` is now linked only when wallet is
enabled, because the `qrencode.h` header is used exclusively in
wallet-specific code.

Ideally, start with the one that should be merged first.

Tested ACK 9f65a7a4942c1addf3efed47a64a54b0889215bf

Tested that only Qt-related targets are rebuilt when `BUILD_GUI=ON` is enabled. Non-GUI targets (`bitcoind`, `bitcoin-node`, `bitcoin`, `bitcoin_clientversion`, `bitcoin_util`, etc.) remain untouched.

Tested on **Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS**

```bash
cmake -B build -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF
cmake --build build
cmake -B build -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF -DBUILD_GUI=ON
cmake --build build
```
